examples.title: Reweighting Implementation
examples.description: Sample code for bias mitigation through instance weighting
examples.code:
from aif360.algorithms.preprocessing import Reweighting
rew = Reweighting(unprivileged_groups=[{'race': 0}], privileged_groups=[{'race': 1}])
dataset_trans = rew.fit_transform(dataset)
examples.explanation: Adjusts sample weights to balance group representation
